FTF.seahorse.name: Seahorse
FTF.seahorse.desc: Other than a superficial resemblance, this fish is nothing like the animal its named after.
FTF.seahorseA1.name: Desacrated Seahorse
FTF.seahorseA1.desc: A stony horn splits from its weakened skull. A horrible mockery of an entity it once honored.
FTF.tigershark.name: Tiger Shark
FTF.tigershark.desc: This striped hunter is notable for having the widest food spectrum of all sharks.
FTF.tigersharkA1.name: Veiny Shark
FTF.tigersharkA1.desc: Skin turned pink from excessive vein growth and disgustingly enlarged teeth. And for some reason... it smells like... cherries?
FTF.hagfish.name: Hagfish
FTF.hagfish.desc: A strange eel that can excrete copious amounts of fiberous and milky slime.
FTF.hagfishA1.name: Wounded Hagfish
FTF.hagfishA1.desc: Throbbing pustules form and burst constantly, its slime replaced with blood and pus. This being will not last long.
FTF.triops.name: Triops
FTF.triops.desc: A three-eyed shrimp, also a common enemy of rice farmers.
FTF.triopsA1.name: Pixelated Triops
FTF.triopsA2.name: Sickening Visage
FTF.triopsA2.desc: The mutilated body of what used to be a shrimp cries out in terror, but nothing will ever be able to hear it.
FTF.blackseahare.name: Black Sea Hare
FTF.blackseahare.desc: The largest known sea slug species, it mainly feeds on seaweeds and kelp.
FTF.blackseahareA1.name: MISSING_FILE
FTF.blackseahareA1.desc: ERROR: File 'Gored Sea Hare' not found.
FTF.pyrosome.name: Giant Pyrosome
FTF.pyrosome.desc: Many smaller creatures form together to create this massive superorganism. A truly spectacular sight.
FTF.pyrosomeA1.name: Psychedelic Pyrosome
FTF.pyrosomeA1.desc: Despite its mask of happiness, it drowns in dark despair.
FTF.pyrosomeA2.name: Chunk Of The Hive
FTF.pyrosomeA2.desc: It wails, longing to incorporate more matter into itself. A being born from primal jealousy and hate.
FTF.bluebutton.name: Blue Button
FTF.bluebutton.desc: A sting from this peculiar hydrozoan causes slight skin irritation.
FTF.bluebuttonA1.name: Tempting Button
FTF.bluebuttonA1.desc: Impossible luxury or death, plague and rot? Only one way to find out... Push it if you dare.
FTF.blueringedoctopus.name: Blue Ringed Octopus
FTF.blueringedoctopus.desc: The bite of this cephalopod carries enough venom to kill over 20 adult humans within minutes.
FTF.blueringedoctopusA1.name: Split Octopus
FTF.blueringedoctopusA1.desc: A buildup of toxic thoughts caused this feeble-minded creature to explode.
FTF.manowar.name: Man O' War
FTF.manowar.desc: Although it resembles a jellyfish, this odd organism is in fact a siphonophore.
FTF.manowarA1.name: Man's Greed
FTF.manowarA1.desc: Endless riches. Endless longing. Endless hunger.
FTF.nematodes.name: Nematodes
FTF.nematodes.desc: Often also referred to as roundworms, these small but mighty creatures inhabit a broad range of environments.
FTF.nematodesA1.name: Ravenous Nematode
FTF.nematodesA1.desc: Having already eaten its kin, this creature’s hunger has now grown endless.
